elements.title: lang::report_page_033_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_u.id,
       CONCAT(kbi_u.firstname, ' ', kbi_u.lastname)                               AS name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ctx.instanceid)                                     as courses,
       SUM(v.learners)                                                    as learners,
       MAX(CASE WHEN kbi_lit.timespend IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE kbi_lit.timespend END) AS timespend,
       MAX(CASE WHEN kbi_lit.visits IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE kbi_lit.visits END)       AS visits
FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
       JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_c.visible = 1
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_ctx.instanceid, COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ra.userid) as learners
                  FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                         JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
                         JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_c.visible = 1
                  WHERE kbi_ra.userid > 0
                    AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
                  GROUP BY kbi_ctx.instanceid) v ON v.instanceid = kbi_ctx.instanceid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_lit.userid,
                         SUM(CASE WHEN kbi_lil.timespend IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE kbi_lil.timespend END) AS timespend,
                         SUM(CASE WHEN kbi_lil.visits IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE kbi_lil.visits END)       AS visits
                  FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                         JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50 AND kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
                         JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_ctx.instanceid AND kbi_c.visible = 1
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_lit
                           ON kbi_lit.userid = kbi_ra.userid AND kbi_lit.courseid = kbi_ctx.instanceid
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_track_log kbi_lil ON kbi_lil.trackid = kbi_lit.id
                  WHERE kbi_lil.id > 0
                    AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
                  GROUP BY kbi_lit.userid) lit ON kbi_lit.userid = kbi_ra.userid
WHERE kbi_u.id > 0
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
GROUP BY kbi_u.id, kbi_u.firstname, kbi_u.lastname
